c.d: Average rating provided by users of the app/platform.
c.s: App Store, Google Play Store, Various Sources

c.d: Total number of ratings and reviews an app has received. Higher numbers indicate broader user engagement.
Strength and activity of the user community (e.g., active forums, user lists, social features).
Ability of the app to provide movie recommendations based on user ratings and preferences.
Availability of cast, crew, plot summaries, trailers, and other movie details.
Ability to create and manage a watchlist of movies to watch.
Functionality to share ratings and reviews on social media platforms.
Integration of critic reviews and scores from various publications.
Platforms the app is available on (iOS, Android, Web).
How user-friendly and intuitive the app interface is.
